ohtani.title: Ohtani's three-hit day propels Dodgers to 10-1 win
ohtani.blurb: Three hits and two RBIs from Shohei Ohtani, plus eight Ks from Roki Sasaki boosts the Dodgers to a 10-1 win over the Angels

imanaga.title: Mike Yastrzemski hits go-ahead double in Braves' win
imanaga.blurb: Mike Yastrzemski comes up clutch with a go-ahead double in the 8th inning to back a lockdown bullpen performance in the Braves' 4-1 win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Edgar Quero's clutch homer lifts White Sox over Cubs
suzuki.blurb: Cubs and White Sox go back-and-forth until Edgar Quero ends it with a walk-off three-run homer, lifting the White Sox over their cross-town rivals

yoshida.title: Willson Contreras hits go-ahead homer in Red Sox win
yoshida.blurb: Willson Contreras hits the clutch go-ahead home run in the 8th inning of the Red Sox 3-2 win over the Braves

okamoto.title: Daulton Varsho's clutch hit leads Blue Jays to win
okamoto.blurb: Daulton Varsho comes up clutch with a go-ahead single and Yohendrick Piñango hits his first career homer to lead the Blue Jays to a 2-1 win over the Tigers

murakami.title: Edgar Quero's clutch homer lifts White Sox over Cubs
murakami.blurb: Cubs and White Sox go back-and-forth until Edgar Quero ends it with a walk-off three-run homer, lifting the White Sox over their cross-town rivals

matsui.title: Gavin Sheets crushes two homers in Padres' win
matsui.blurb: Gavin Sheets has a huge night in Seattle, going 3-3 with two home runs and a double in the Padres' 8-3 victory over the Mariners
